key.name: daemon-url
key.description: URL of the wyrelogd daemon used when --daemon-url is omitted on the command line. Empty string means "no default; the CLI flag must be provided."

key.name: default-tenant
key.description: Tenant value used when --tenant is omitted. Empty string means "no default; the CLI flag must be provided."

key.name: default-graph
key.description: Graph value used when --graph is omitted. Empty string means "no default; the CLI flag must be provided."

key.name: access-token-file
key.summary: Path to the bearer access token file
key.description: Filesystem path used when --access-token-file is omitted. The file must be a regular file owned by the invoking user with mode 0600 or stricter; symlinks and broader permissions are rejected before any daemon request is sent. The schema stores only the path, never the token bytes.

key.name: default-timeout-ms
key.description: Timeout used when --timeout-ms is omitted. Must lie in the same 1..60000 range the CLI enforces.

key.name: default-guard-loc-class
key.summary: Default location class for guard evaluation
key.description: Value used when --guard-loc-class is omitted. Empty string means "no default; the CLI flag must be provided."

key.name: default-guard-risk
key.summary: Default risk score for guard evaluation
key.description: Value used when --guard-risk is omitted. Valid scores are 0..100; -1 is the "unset" sentinel because 0 is a real guard-risk value.

key.name: default-guard-timestamp-mode
key.description: "none" preserves the historical behaviour where --guard-timestamp must be supplied on every invocation. "now" causes wyctl to substitute the current wall-clock timestamp when the flag is omitted. A frozen literal default is intentionally not offered, because operator workstations would replay the same timestamp across invocations.
